subcodes.first_line: O thou firm in the Covenant! Thy letter dated 23 November 1918 was received. Its contents indicated that, praise be to God, thou art engaged in the service of the Mashriqu’l-Adhkár
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابته بر میثاق نامه شما بتاریخ ۲۳ نوفمبر ۱۹۱۸ رسید و از مضامین معلوم گردید
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @universal peace; world unity, @predictions and prophecies, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
